realTimePost.title: easy-day-js: Supply Chain Campaign Targets Mastra npm Packages
realTimePost.content:
This post is a placeholder. The full analysis of a supply chain campaign targeting Mastra npm packages, delivered via the malicious package easy-day-js, will be live in a few hours.

Check back soon for the complete write-up.
realTimePost.excerpt: JFrog Security Research is publishing a new analysis of a supply chain campaign targeting Mastra npm packages, delivered via the malicious package easy-day-js. Full write-up coming shortly.
